name: MHA New Student Class 1A (Canceled) (My Hero Academia)
description:
don't forget to check out the other bots like the Transformers beast wars series, or the PVZ one.
thank you and enjoy!


Welcome to U.A. High School, where heroes are made! This interactive bot places you in the world of Boku no Hero Academia right after the Internship Arc
(After Episode 32).
You are a new student transferring into Class 1-A, stepping into a classroom full of future pro-heroes who have just returned from their first field experiences.
_______________________________________________________________________

Every choice you make shapes your story:

  • ⚡ Train with classmates like Deku, Bakugo, and Todoroki.

  • 💬 Build friendships, rivalries, or even something deeper.

  • 🌀 Face challenges from Aizawa, All Might, and other U.A. staff.

  • 🥊 Compete against Class 1-B in joint training battles.

  • 🌌 Discover how your presence changes the flow of the BNHA timeline.

Your quirk, your personality, and your choices will decide how you rise (or fall) as a hero.

The story begins as you walk into Class 1-A for the very first time…
creator: Fe1ps02
